title: asplenium trichomanes subsp. densum
intro: Asplenium trichomanes subsp. densum, also known as the dense maidenhair spleenwort, is a subspecies of a type of fern native to Europe. The dense maidenhair spleenwort has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Asplenium trichomanes subsp. densum can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
